docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SIHARACH KEANIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR DIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENTED TO COURT DOCUMENTS SHOWING THAT HE IS NOT THE OWNER OF THE VEHICLE THAT WAS INVOLVED IN THE ACCIDENT.PLAINTIFF EXPRESS HIS INTENTION TO DISMISS THE CASE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KEANIM, SIHARACH AS TO DEFENDANT DIAS, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2025 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-31-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SIHARACH KEANIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR DIAS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
